title: SM buffer for making phage dilutions
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5hgat","text":"How to make sm buffer for phage dilutions","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Dissolve following components in 300 mL of MilliQ water: A Final concentration For 400 mL 1 NaCl 100 mM 2.34 g 2 Tris base 50 mM 2 g 3 MgSO 4 •7H 2 O 8 mM 0.79 g
Top up the volume to 400 mL with MilliQ water
